summary: Iteration 39 - Tested 3 bug fixes: (1) Search panel stays open on first keypress, (2) User profile 3-column layout, (3) Admin delete reports/bug-reports. All 8 backend tests PASS. All frontend tests PASS.

design_issues.screen: UserProfilePage - when gallery has photos AND isSelf=true (3 children in grid)
issues: UserJourney has 'md:col-span-2' class which works well when Gallery is hidden (Journey fills cols 2-3). However when Gallery IS visible (3 children: Profile+Gallery+Journey in md:grid-cols-3), Journey's col-span-2 would technically overflow the 3-col grid into an implicit 4th column. Visually appears OK from screenshots but may result in sub-optimal column widths when user has photos. Consider reviewing if col-span-2 on Journey is still appropriate after the gallery col-span-3 removal.

features_tested.search_panel_stays_open_first_char: PASS - Clicked search-icon-btn, typed 't', panel remained open. Bug Fix #1 verified.
features_tested.search_panel_stays_open_multiple_chars: PASS - Typed 'test', panel remained open throughout.
features_tested.search_panel_closes_on_click_outside: PASS - Panel closed when clicking outside the search area.
features_tested.delete_report_endpoint: PASS - DELETE /api/admin/reports/{id} returns 404 for non-existent, 200 for valid deletion.
features_tested.delete_bug_report_endpoint: PASS - DELETE /api/admin/bug-reports/{id} returns 404 for non-existent, 200 for valid deletion.
features_tested.admin_reports_trash_button: PASS - data-testid='delete-report-{id}' buttons present with Trash2 SVG icon.
features_tested.admin_bug_reports_trash_button: PASS - data-testid='delete-bug-report-{id}' buttons present (11 bug reports found with trash icons).
features_tested.delete_report_functional: PASS - Clicking trash button with confirm dialog deleted a report (count went from 2 to 1).
features_tested.delete_requires_admin: PASS - Non-admin user gets 403 for both DELETE endpoints.
features_tested.profile_layout_3col: PASS - Grid has md:grid-cols-3, childCount=3, none have col-span-3. Profile|Gallery|Journey in same row.
features_tested.gallery_no_col_span_3: PASS - UserGallery component no longer has md:col-span-3 (verified in code and at runtime).

action_items: MINOR: Consider updating UserJourney's 'md:col-span-2' to just 1 column when gallery is visible - currently col-span-2 on Journey in a 3-child md:grid-cols-3 grid may overflow to an implicit 4th column. Visually functional but technically impure layout. Could use conditional col-span class based on whether gallery renders.
critical_code_review_comments: UserJourney.js line 7: 'md:col-span-2' on the outer div is designed for the case when Gallery is not rendered (Journey takes up cols 2-3). When Gallery IS rendered (3 children in 3-col grid), Journey's col-span-2 overflows into an implicit column. The fix removed col-span-3 from Gallery but did not update Journey's col-span. Functionally works due to CSS Grid implicit column behavior, but may produce unexpected widths on browsers with stricter overflow handling.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test user report and bug report during backend tests. Report count in admin panel reduced by 1 (deleted one report during UI test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 bug fixes tested and confirmed: (1) Search panel fix in Navigation.js - handleSearchChange no longer calls setSearchOpen(false), panel stays open while typing. (2) UserGallery.js - md:col-span-3 removed, 3-col layout restored. UserJourney still has md:col-span-2 (works when gallery hidden, minor layout concern when gallery visible with 3 children). (3) Admin delete endpoints: DELETE /api/admin/reports/{id} and DELETE /api/admin/bug-reports/{id} both work. Frontend buttons present with data-testid pattern. Backend: admin.py routes 337-350 added.
rca_of_issue: No regressions or new bugs found. All 3 fixes verified working as described.
